task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tasks dashboard or the 'Annual Report 2023' document view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface should be visible, displaying either a list of pending tasks or the 'Annual Report 2023' document summary page.

task_completion.description: Open the pending Serial Document Review task for the 'Annual Report 2023' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A task panel or page specifically titled 'Serial Document Review' (or similar review task) for the 'Annual Report 2023' document should be open and visible.

task_completion.description: Locate and interact with the comment input field for the review task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cursor should be focused on the comment text box within the workflow/task review panel.

task_completion.description: Enter the exact required approval comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Reviewed and approved. Content is accurate and complete.' must be visible inside the task's comment input field.

task_completion.description: Submit the review by approving the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicking the 'Validate' (or 'Approve') button, or a subsequent success message/empty task list indicating the review task has been successfully completed.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Nuxeo web interface in a browser, not terminal windows running curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The comment was entered into the actual Nuxeo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The comment text must be typed into the Nuxeo task comment box, not into a separate text editor, notepad, or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actually submitted the form rather than just typing the text and stopping.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the 'Validate' button being clicked or the task disappearing from the pending list, rather than the trajectory ending with just the text typed in the box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document is located at '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023' in Nuxeo. The workflow is a 'SerialDocumentReview' in 'simpleReview' mode. To successfully complete the task, the agent must enter the exact comment 'Reviewed and approved. Content is accurate and complete.' and click the 'Validate' button in the Nuxeo web interface.
